name: Apricot Brandy Pound Cake #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter or margarine until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar and beat until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
4. Mix in vanilla, orange, rum, and lemon extracts.
5. Alternately add sifted dry ingredients with sour cream and brandy, blending well.
6. Pour batter into a greased 3-quart bundt pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for about 1 hour and 15 minutes.
8. Cool in the pan on a rack before serving.
